name: TAC SS

description.consumer:
Any wall. Any location. No wiring.

The TAC SS goes anywhere — no electrician required. Stick it by the bed, at the entrance, on a kitchen island. Six scenes at your fingertips, wherever it makes sense.
description.technical:
A battery-powered Zigbee scene switch with 6 configurable buttons for wireless scene and automation triggering — no wiring required.

Can be wall-mounted or surface-mounted at any location without electrical installation. Backlit with customizable icons. Available in PP or anti-glare glass in black, white, or gold.

Key Specifications
- Buttons: 6
- Power: Battery
- Function: Scene triggers only (no relay)
- Protocol: Zigbee 3.0
- Materials: PP or AG glass
- Colours: Black, White, Gold
- Installation: Wireless, wall or surface mount

⚠ No relay — does not switch electrical loads. Battery-powered scene control only.

specs.summary: Input: 3V (2 × CR2032 batteries) | Communication Protocol: Zigbee | Product Size: 86 × 86 × 12 mm | Installation: Magnetic / Portable | Working Temperature: -10°C to +60°C | Working Humidity: ≤95% RH (non-condensing)
specs.installation: Wall-mounted or surface-mounted (wireless, no wiring required)

limitations: No relay. Battery-powered scene control only. Does not switch electrical loads. Materials: PP or AG glass. Colours: Black, White, Gold.
